data.title: Walmart, Dropbox And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
Microsoft Stock Moves Up 1.8% After Power Inflow Alert
data.description: February 19th at 10:20 AM, a significant trading signal occurred for Microsoft (MSFT) as it demonstrated a Power Inflow at $408.21.

data.title: Quantum Computing Stocks RGTI, QUBT, IONQ, QBTS Cheer Microsoft's 'Majorana 1' Launch: Satya Nadella Calls It A 'Physics And Fabrication Breakthrough'
data.description: As Microsoft's Satya Nadella announced Majorana 1, the quantum computing stocks jumped with the euphoria surrounding the discovery.

data.title: Palantir Stock Falls Nearly 4% In Thursday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) stock dropped 2.6% in the pre-market trading session on Thursday amid the Pentagon budget cut plan and the CEO's stock sale plan.

data.title: Tesla Exec Pins Delay In Cybertruck Crash Test Report On NHTSA, Says 'We've Known It Was 5 Star From The Beginning'
data.description: Tesla Inc executive Lars Moravy said on Wednesday that the delay in getting the crash protection rating on the Cybertruck was owing to the schedule set by the U.S. auto safety regulator National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA).
